name: Concord Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Concord Community Center in Concord, NH! There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Concord Family YMCA
description: Concord Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Concord, NH. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available.

name: ExpressPickleball
description: ExpressPickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hooksett, NH. There are 7 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.

name: Fishersfield Recreation Area
description: Fishersfield Recreation Area is a place to play pickleball in Newbury, NH. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Hooksett Town Hall
description: Come play pickleball at Hooksett Town Hall in Hooksett, NH! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Howard Recreation Center
description: Howard Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Concord, NH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Mountainside Racquet and Fitness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Mountainside Racquet and Fitness Center in New London, NH! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Outing Club Indoor Center
description: Come play pickleball at Outing Club Indoor Center in New London, NH! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. Reservations are available.

name: Rolfe Park
description: Rolfe Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Boyce, NH. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Rollins Park
description: Come play pickleball at Rollins Park in Concord, NH! There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The court is free. The court cannot be reserved.

name: Skate Murdough
description: Come play pickleball at Skate Murdough in Contoocook, NH! There are 2 courts. 1 is indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Woodward Park, New London
description: Woodward Park, New London is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New London, NH. There are 6 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.
